message:
fix(tests): improve test determinism and sync beads

- Adjust expected_loss tests with explicit loss matrix values
- Fix test posteriors to be more extreme for clearer outcomes
- Update supervision_tests with proper configurations
- Sync 22+ new beads from research session covering:
  - Premium TUI with ratatui best practices
  - AI agent ergonomics and discoverability
  - Advanced installation and auto-update
  - Charm gum shell mode integration
  - Observability integration (Prometheus, OpenTelemetry)
  - Container-aware process grouping
  - GPU process detection
  - MCP server integration
  - Plugin system for custom evidence
  - Accessibility features

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
